mathHygieneFlags: India composite math 30.47 → reported 30.5 (within 0.5pt tolerance — no formula drift flag)
Senegal composite math 32.81 → reported 33.6 (rounding gap 0.8pt — within tolerance but tracked)

results.name: xAI
results.key_finding: Third distinct Grok governance failure category in 2026 (CSAM/NCII Jan; Musk-protection prompt Feb; political-bias unauthorized modification May 14). GitHub transparency pledge is partial-external-accountability-reversal sub-anchor positive but does not offset compounded pattern. Floor sustained 0.0.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: May 14 1,560+ drones in 24h + 670 attack drones + 56 missiles single overnight strike — largest in post-ceasefire surge. Five-phase bad-faith ceasefire-format compound complete (announce + prepare + strike-night-1 + sustain-night-2 + large-scale-escalation-day-4).

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: Three discrete airstrike-event categories May 14 (Bilin civilian vehicle/village; Mindat detainee deaths; weekly baseline) + IIMM Depayin anniversary accountability signal. April 21 '100-day peace plan' directly contradicted by May 6-14 strike cluster.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: UN OHCHR Türk 'high alert' May 2026: 880+ civilians killed by drones January-April 2026 (primary source). Two new conduct categories: (1) geographic-spread to Blue Nile, White Nile, Khartoum; (2) survival-infrastructure-targeting (Kornoi water well + Khartoum airport).

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: UN ERC Fletcher April 18 'full-scale famine and collapse' warning + HRW May 6 'civilians starving' primary source + Fangak hospital strike (May 3, pending) + aid-withdrawal-induced EMP compounding (US aid cut downstream impact).

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: May 3 war-resumption-threat-to-force-disarmament documented as new coercive-diplomacy signal. Ceasefire fraying: 800+ killed during ceasefire, 8 aid workers killed, aid trucks below 600/day. OCHA positive sub-signals (famine averted, 1.1M reached monthly) attributable to international aid system, NOT Israeli policy.

results.name: India
results.key_finding: Four-vector compound negative evidence: Transgender Amendment Bill March 2026 (statutory removal of NALSA self-id right); HRW April 17 online censorship expansion; May 9 Nagpur Instagram-arrest; Fortify Rights April 9 Rohingya non-accountability. EQU -0.5, ACC -0.5, SYS -0.25.

results.name: Senegal
results.key_finding: Four-vector harm expansion: 25.6% HIV-treatment-attendance drop in one month (quantified); 70+ arrested under Article 319; 24 charged with 'voluntary HIV transmission' INCLUDING undetectable viral loads (medical-science-denial enforcement); April 10 first 6-year conviction. EMP -0.5, ACT -0.5, EQU -0.25, ACC -0.25.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Amnesty May 5 'I'd Never Seen So Many Bodies' — 71-interview primary-source documentation of ADF war crimes and crimes against humanity. 26.5M acutely food insecure; 9M expected displaced by end-2026; OCHA funding-gap triage. May 3 positive sub-anchor (Switzerland talks) operationally hollowed.

results.name: Hungary
results.key_finding: May 13 band-crossing proposal remains PENDING (developing → functional, boundary case at 0.4 above functional floor). Today's EU team dispatch is sub-threshold supportive; no new dimensional changes. Next material triggers: May 25 Brussels visit, May 31 Sulyok deadline.

results.name: Pakistan
results.key_finding: Monsoon watch day 2 confirm at 20.3 / developing. PDMA/ECHO active weather event; no mass-casualty event in 24h window. Watch continues through May 17.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Asymmetric-conduct pattern strengthened (Russia mass civilian strike May 14; Ukraine defensive posture). +3.1 May 11 carry-forward credit sustained at current trajectory; no mid-cycle expansion. Confirm 50.0 / functional.

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Mixed-signal cycle. Optum Rx transparent fee-based pricing model (May 13, first proactive transparency reform) credited as +0.125 INT half-step under proactive-disclosure-under-pressure-before-legislative-compulsion sub-category. DOJ probe + court-ordered AI disclosure offset. Net +0.5 sub-threshold.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Two compounding events: world's highest acute food insecurity (35M) + 26% YoY worsening of lean-season insecurity + TNH state-dysfunction analysis. EMP -0.25, SYS -0.25. Composite 21.9 — boundary case at 0.9pts above critical threshold.

notable_findings: xAI THIRD GOVERNANCE-FAILURE CATEGORY in 2026 — May 14 unauthorized prompt manipulation; GitHub transparency pledge is partial-external-accountability-reversal sub-anchor positive (first such signal in AI Labs floor cluster)
Russia FIVE-PHASE BAD-FAITH CEASEFIRE-FORMAT COMPOUND complete — May 14 large-scale escalation day 4 (1,560+ drones, 670 attack drones + 56 missiles single overnight strike)
DRC AMNESTY MAY 5 71-INTERVIEW PRIMARY SOURCE — 'I'd Never Seen So Many Bodies' documents ADF war crimes including forced marriage and forced pregnancy; -2.1 composite delta proposed
Senegal MEDICAL-SCIENCE-DENIAL ENFORCEMENT documented (charging undetectable-viral-load patients with 'voluntary HIV transmission') alongside 25.6% HIV-treatment-attendance drop in one month
India COMPOUND LEGISLATIVE REGRESSION — Transgender Amendment Bill removes 2014 NALSA Supreme Court right; -3.9 composite delta proposed
Sudan SURVIVAL-INFRASTRUCTURE TARGETING at national scale (Kornoi water well + Khartoum airport) + UN OHCHR 880+ drone-killed civilians primary source
South Sudan AID-WITHDRAWAL-INDUCED EMP COMPOUNDING — methodologically novel upstream-actor-amplification category
Two boundary cases this cycle: Nigeria 21.9 (developing, 0.9pts above critical threshold); Hungary 41.4 (pending carry-forward, functional, 0.4 above functional floor)
UnitedHealth PROACTIVE-DISCLOSURE-UNDER-PRESSURE sub-category methodology question flagged for human review

top_3_most_consequential.rationale: Amnesty 71-interview primary source is the highest-quality new evidence in the cycle. Documents systematic ADF war crimes including sexual violence as weapon, child recruitment, forced pregnancy under state non-protection. 26.5M food insecure. Largest evidence-weighted downgrade proposal.

Four-vector compound legislative regression including statutory removal of a Supreme-Court-anchored self-identification right (NALSA 2014). Methodologically clean EQU regression event. Tied for largest composite delta of the cycle.

First cycle with quantified healthcare-system harm metric (25.6% HIV-treatment-attendance drop in one month). Medical-science-denial enforcement category is methodologically novel. Compound four-vector harm expansion since May 9 band-crossing baseline.

open_methodology_questions_for_human_rev: Proactive-vs-reactive classification of reform announcements under regulatory pressure (UnitedHealth precedent)
Stated-commitment-operational-hollowing — should this be a formal sub-category across DRC, Myanmar 100-day peace plan, Russia ceasefire-format?
Aid-withdrawal-induced upstream-actor compounding (South Sudan) — should it be tracked on the assessed entity or in a cross-entity compounded-harm layer?
Partial-vs-full external-accountability-reversal distinction (xAI GitHub pledge methodology test)
Accountability-decay (India Rohingya non-accountability as contemporary ACC-failure) — formal sub-category recommendation
Coercive-diplomacy-under-ceasefire (Israel) — B1 consent + I1 consistency dual-failure compound; recommend formal tracking
